title: Twitter-style short posts
text: ok but why is everyone sleeping on this. anyway just dropped my new playlist — link in bio. fr fr go check it out.

tips.text: Twitter/X posts are short and punchy

character_tips.anna: Twitter rhythm. Short, punchy, lowercase intentional.
character_tips.maxim: Short-form is the dominant content format. Drill it.
